title: ISBA/31/C/17
text:
International Seabed Authority  ISBA/31/C/ 17 
  
Council 
 
Advance Unedited Version  
18 March 2026 
 
English  only 

Thirty-first session  
Council session, part I  
Kingston, 9– 20 March 2026  
Agenda i tem 10  
Consideration, with a view to approval, of applications for 
extension of a contract for exploration, if any  

  Decision of the Council of the International Seabed 
Authority relating to an application for extension of the 
contract for exploration for polymetallic nodules between 
the Institut français de recherche pour l’exploitation de la 
mer and the Authority 

 The Council of the International Seabed Authority ,  
 Acting upon the recommendation of the Legal and Technical Commission, 1 
 Recalling  that, on 20 June 2001, the Institut français de recherche pour 
l’exploitation de la mer entered into a 15- year contract for exploration for 
polymetallic nodules with the International Seabed Authority,  
 Recalling also  that the contract was extended for a period of five years to 19 
June 2021 2 and for a further five years to 19 June 2026, 3 
 Noting  that, on 16 December 2025, the Secretary- General of the Authority 
received an application for an additional five -year extension of the contract,  
 Recalling section 1, paragraph 9, of the annex to the Agreement relating to the 
Implementation of Part XI of the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea 
of 10 December 1982, 4 
 Recalling also  the decision of the Council of the Authority relating to the 
procedures and criteria for the extension of an approved plan of work for exploration 
pursuant to section 1, paragraph 9, of the annex to the Agreement, 5 
__________________ 
 1 ISBA/31/C/10 . 
 2 ISBA/22/C/26 . 
 3 ISBA/26/C/54 . 
 4  United Nations, Treaty Series , vol. 1836, No. 31364.  
 5  ISBA/21/C/19 . 
ISBA/31/C/17  
 
 2/2 
 
 Considering  the report and recommendations of the Legal and Technical 
Commission relating to the application by the Institut français de recherche pour 
l’exploitation de la mer for extension of the contract, 6 
 Decides to approve the application for extension of the contract;  
 Requests the Secretary -General to take the steps necessary to execute the 
extension of the contract, with effect from 20 June 2026, by signature of an agreement 
in the form set out in appendix II to the annex to the decision of the Council of the 
International Seab ed Authority mentioned above; 7  
 Also requests the Secretary -General to report to the Council at its next session 
on the status of the extension agreement.  
352nd Meeting  
18 March 2026  
 
__________________ 
 6  ISBA/31/C/10 . 
 7  See ISBA/21/C/19 .
